verdict_summary: Captured 53,955 bytes of real zeta /v1/rooms/{roomId}/messages/stream SSE (62 chunks, 61 IN_PROGRESS + 1 CHAT_COMPLETE) via DevTools Network 'Copy response'. Confirmed schema mismatch: zeta uses chunkMessage.contents[] ARRAY of speaker-aware text segments — v2 envelope's flat chunkMessage.{text,role} crashes SPA's contents[0] indexer.

evidence.method_used: DevTools Network panel - right-click POST /v1/rooms/{roomId}/messages/stream - Copy response (raw text/event-stream body, no fetch+ReadableStream replay needed)
evidence.sanitization_check: 0 eyJ-prefixed JWT-like blobs, 0 'Bearer ' tokens; user prompt '안녕하세요' (non-PII); only IDs are roomId/messageId/candidateId UUIDs (not auth secrets)

key_findings: ROOT CAUSE of MessagePort TypeError: zeta_sse_v2 envelope ships chunkMessage.{text:string,role:'assistant'} but ACTUAL zeta schema is chunkMessage.{contents:[{type,speakerName,position,text}],index} — SPA bundle 113b2gcua4vkz.js:50 indexes contents[0], crashes because v2 has no contents[] array.

ARRAY-INDEXED FIELD: chunkMessage.contents[0] (and replyMessage.contents[0] on CHAT_COMPLETE). Each contents entry: {type:'TEXT', speakerName:'<character>', position:'LEFT'|'NARRATOR'|'RIGHT', text:'<segment>'}. A single frame can carry MULTIPLE segments (character + narrator + character).
STREAMING PATTERN IS CUMULATIVE: Each IN_PROGRESS frame ships the FULL text-so-far in contents[].text (not delta). Last IN_PROGRESS frame holds complete final text before CHAT_COMPLETE.

CHAT_COMPLETE envelope is RICH: replyMessage requires {id, roomId, sender:{id,type:'BOT'}, contents:[], voice, edited, candidateId, messageTime, voicePrice, isIntro, snapshotImage, snapshotImagePrice, bookmarkId, cyoa} PLUS top-level requestMessage echo + shouldNudgeSlowChat + shouldGenerateConsecutive + shouldRequestFeedback + feedbackPredefinedComments[] flags. v2 only has replyMessage.{id,text,role} — many missing fields.

FIX RECIPE for zeta_sse_v3 envelope: chunkMessage.contents=[{type:'TEXT',speakerName:'<bot name from request context>',position:'LEFT',text:'<warning text cumulative>'}], no role field. CHAT_COMPLETE.replyMessage requires sender:{id:'BOT-<botId>',type:'BOT'}, contents[], candidateId, messageTime, isIntro:false; also include requestMessage echoing the user prompt.
notes: Zeta is a Korean character-roleplay platform; responses are speaker-tagged (LEFT=character, NARRATOR=scene description, RIGHT=user echo). The 526-byte v2 envelope template (chunkMessage:{id,text,role:assistant} + replyMessage:{id,text,role:assistant}) is structurally incompatible with this multi-speaker contents[] model — SPA expects per-segment array indexing for rendering speaker bubbles. Method (c) Console fetch+ReadableStream replay was NOT needed because Chrome's Network Response tab fully shows text/event-stream bodies for zeta's POST stream endpoint (different from perplexity #750 case). User session was guest/anonymous (sender.type=USER, speakerName='Guest') — same SSE schema applies to logged-in users (only sender.id changes from USER-<guestUUID> to USER-<accountUUID>).
